name: Rogue Wars
short_description: Rouge Wars is a great FPS game to play with friends or by yourself. Earn coins by playing to purchase new characters, weapon skins, and better weapons. Play with your friends with either 2,4,6, or 8 players on a team.
detailed_description:
Open Beta

Rogue Wars goes into "Open Beta" on Dec 9th. Expect a couple bugs in some multiplayer modes that were limited in testing. We assure you we will be on these immediately. we are currently working on an air strike, and demolition bomb planting issues. Patch will be released ASAP. If you find a bug please message @Rogue_Game_Development on instagram. All info is appreciated.


Multiplayer

You may have problems playing multiplayer until we get enough players into the system. you need at least 2 players to start a multiplayer match. you can always level up and get coins yourself in TDM, and Free for All. :)


Air Strike Bug

We are currently working on a problem with the air strike some users are having. YOU WILL NOT BE ABLE TO LAUNCH THE AIR STRIKE DUE TO THIS BUG. So PLEASE refrain from using the air strike or you will get stuck in the launching map. -sorry about the inconvenience


Bug Fixes Coming ASAP

all bugs found in the first 1-3 days of launch will get immediately worked on! EXPECT UPDATES COMING SATURDAY-TUESDAY! Thanks for all of your patience. :)


"Username" when loggin in

when logging in to Lovatto you will be asked for you username and password. NOTE: your username is not your in game name but THE "USERNAME" SPECIFIED WHEN CREATING THE ACCOUNT. NOT YOUR IN GAME NAME. if you have any questions please ask in the community section.


Translations (not english)

all translations that are not in english were auto generated please do not purchase if you will have a problem with this. Thanks! :) sorry for any confusion.


About the Game

Rouge Wars is a great FPS game to play with friends or by yourself. Earn coins by playing to purchase new characters, weapon skins, and better weapons. Play with your friends with either 2,4,6, or 8 players on a team. Join your friends in a clan to group up with more people. We currently have 5 game modes. Elimination Team Death Match Gun race Demolition Free for all Battle royale (COMING SOON) our game has around 15 different weapons that you can customize to your liking at any time using the weapon customizer. Along with weapon customization you can change your weapons and class in the load out tab. Play all the way to LVL 78!
